name: Everstake SWQoS

api_key.note: No API key needed for RPC path. QUIC path requires pubkey whitelisting (contact Everstake to authorize your pubkey).

cost_on_failure: unknown (tip is embedded in TX, so likely lost on failure)

rate_limits.rpc: Not explicitly documented (no per-second limit stated)

sendTransaction_rpc.description: Standard Solana JSON-RPC sendTransaction. TX must include a SystemProgram::transfer instruction to one of the tip wallets with >= 500000 lamports.
requirements: Transaction must include a SystemProgram::transfer to a tip wallet
Do NOT add the tip address to an AddressLookupTable
Transaction must be fully signed before submission

sendTransaction_quic.description: Raw serialized transaction bytes sent over QUIC unidirectional stream. No JSON-RPC wrapping.
requirements: Must authorize your pubkey with Everstake before connecting
Uses QUINN library for Rust clients
TLS with dummy x509 certificate derived from keypair
Transaction sent via open_uni() stream, finalized with finish()

features.stake_weighted_qos: Everstake's validator stake provides prioritized transaction delivery to block leaders

http2_support.h2c_cleartext: Use http:// endpoints with http2_prior_knowledge() for lowest latency
http2_support.h2_alpn: Use https:// endpoints for HTTP/2 via ALPN

quic_direct_path.description: Direct QUIC connection to validator for lowest latency, bypasses HTTP layer entirely

single_leader_routing.description: Routes all transactions to single leader instead of following schedule

features.priority_fees: Not documented (standard Solana priority fees presumably still apply)

notes.recommended_http_config: Use h2c (HTTP/2 prior knowledge over http://) for lowest latency on RPC path
